headline: PTC (PTC) Stock Just Lost Its Place In Major Russell Growth Indices
summary: PTC Inc. (NasdaqGS:PTC) has been removed from multiple major Russell growth and benchmark indices. The changes affect index-based funds and mandates that previously included PTC as a constituent. The index removal may influence the stock's visibility, liquidity, and institutional ownership profile. PTC enters this index reshuffle after a mixed stretch for the stock, with the share price at $124.98 and the value score at 6. The stock is up 9.7% over the past week, but down 8.8% over the past...
